<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Find the exact cells that changed
curr_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
prev_lines = previous_frame.ascii.split('\n')

diffs = []
for i, (c, p) in enumerate(zip(curr_lines, prev_lines)):

            diffs.append((i, j, pc, cc))
print(f"Differences ({len(diffs)}):")
for d in diffs:
    print(f"  {d}")

# Check red dots
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
reds = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'r']
print(f"\nRed dots: {len(reds)}")
for r in reds:
    print(f"  boundary={r['boundary']}")
</parameter>
